extracted_from: The document refers to 'Trojan Fund' with UK ISINs (e.g., GB0034243732, GB00B01BP952) and a fund size of '£5,186m' as at 31 December 2025. However, it does not contain any information for the 'Trojan Fund (Ireland)' with ISIN IE00B6T42S66.
extraction_notes: El documento no contiene información sobre el fondo objetivo 'Trojan Fund (Ireland)' con ISIN IE00B6T42S66. La información de tamaño de fondo encontrada (£5,186m) corresponde a un fondo diferente (Trojan Fund con ISINs del Reino Unido).
